chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 55 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of CMA No.2030/2025. 10.11.2025. None present on behalf of the appellant. No intimation is received. This matter is being listed for hearing of the restoration application filed by the appellant challenging the dismissal of the 1st Appeal on 11.09.2025 on the ground of non-prosecution. None present on behalf of the appellant. Accordingly, the CMA No.2030/2025 is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Tufail
